data.summary: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.
data.assessment: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting link upon booking confirmation, which is included in the confirmation email. This directly aligns with the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. The successful execution of the use case, as detailed in the bodyMarkdownPreview, confirms that the integration is functional and meets the specified need.
